message: Operation 'bulkExportPatients' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to clarify the asynchronous nature of the operation, the HTTP response code (202), polling requirements, and the authentication method required. This is critical for AI agents to properly handle the operation workflow.

data.current_description: Initiates a FHIR Bulk Data Export for Patient resources. Returns a Content-Location header with the export status URL.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous FHIR Bulk Data Export for Patient resources according to the FHIR Bulk Data 2.0.0 specification. Returns HTTP 202 Accepted with a Content-Location header containing the export status polling URL. The export operation is asynchronous; clients must poll the status URL to monitor progress and retrieve download links when complete. Requires system-level authentication via OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials flow.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to clarify the asynchronous nature of the operation, the HTTP response code (202), polling requirements, and the authentication method required. This is critical for AI agents to properly handle the operation workflow.
